title: JavaScript DOM Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of selection, modification, and node manipulation in the DOM tree.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the best way to get a reference to an HTML element with ID 'my-btn'?
Which of the following creates a new element in the document?
What is the return type of document.querySelectorAll(".item")?
Which property can you use to change the inner HTML content of an element?
Does appendChild() add a new element to the BEGINNING or END of its parent's children?
options: It depends on the element type.
